title: claytonia exigua
intro: Claytonia exigua, also known as the desert spring beauty or narrow-leaved miner's lettuce, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the portulacaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Claytonia exigua include its potential to support eye health, reduce inflammation, and provide essential minerals such as calcium and iron. The plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement, typically in the form of capsules or teas, or used as a fresh leafy green in salads and other dishes.
